focus: Q4 018 R4 interaction plus Q5 concrete implementation and migration compatibility
summary: Phase 018 R4 already implements the schema-error half of the recommended field-level merge policy.
The valid-file and schema-error paths should be unified behind one shared merge helper and one explicit field policy.
The 007/008/009/010 roots remain a separate missing-spec structural defect because default regen fails before merge runs.
